description: Log in to LibreHealth EHR (admin/password) and record a formal patient amendment for 'Brandie Sammet'. The amendment must be dated 2025-01-15 with a status of 'Accepted' and include the following description: "Patient requests correction to allergy records. Current record incorrectly lists Penicillin allergy. Patient clarifies the actual allergy is to Amoxicillin. Supporting documentation from referring allergist Dr. Marcus Webb provided."
